key_additions: make_pending_watcher() function using notify crate with event-driven filesystem watching
tokio::sync::mpsc channels for inter-task event signaling
tokio::select! replacing pure sleep polling with hybrid event/timeout waiting
dispatcher.rs.test_coverage: Added 2 new tests: atomicity test for fs::rename and watcher event test

Cargo.toml.additions: notify crate with macos_kqueue feature flag
Cargo.toml.rationale: Event-driven filesystem watching for pending directory

changes: Added tokio feature: sync (for mpsc channels)
Changed notify from direct dep to workspace dependency

crates/bop-cli/src/list.rs.refactoring: Extracted resolve_states() function for state filter logic

adapters/ollama-local.nu.functionality: Local Ollama model adapter with file output support
adapters/ollama-local.nu.implications: Indicates adapter consolidation or migration away from Ollama support

Cargo.lock.reason: Indirect dependencies no longer needed after notify dependency update

patterns_discovered.description: Using notify::RecommendedWatcher wrapped in make_pending_watcher() that sends events to tokio mpsc channel for async event handling
patterns_discovered.benefit: Event-driven dispatch reduces latency and CPU usage vs polling

patterns_discovered.description: Storing _wake_tx_keepalive clone of sender to prevent channel closure when watcher fails to init
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents wake_rx.recv() from immediately returning None, avoiding 100% CPU spin

patterns_discovered.description: Watcher returns Option, falls back to poll-only mode if platform doesn't support filesystem watching
Using Arc<AtomicUsize> with spawn threads to validate fs::rename atomicity under concurrent load
patterns_discovered.benefit: Proves only one card claim succeeds despite 4 simultaneous attempts

patterns_discovered.description: tokio::select! waits for filesystem events OR poll timeout, whichever comes first
patterns_discovered.benefit: Responsive event handling with guaranteed polling fallback

patterns_discovered.description: Centralizing notify in root Cargo.toml with feature flags, sub-crates reference via workspace
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consistent versions across workspace, easier feature control

gotchas_discovered.description: Without _wake_tx_keepalive clone, the only sender would be in the watcher. If watcher init fails, sender count becomes 0, causing wake_rx.recv() to immediately return None forever, spinning at 100% CPU in tokio::select!
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Always keep a clone of the sender alive for the lifetime of the receiver

gotchas_discovered.description: notify::RecommendedWatcher may fail initialization on some platforms, returning None from make_pending_watcher(). Dispatcher must gracefully fall back to poll-only mode.
gotchas_discovered.handling: Logged as warning, dispatcher continues with polling

gotchas_discovered.description: Created .bop files may take up to 500ms to trigger filesystem events due to async kernel notification delivery
gotchas_discovered.implication: Cards may have perceptible startup delay on slow filesystems

gotchas_discovered.description: Code removed lock::acquire_dispatcher_lock() call. Ensures only one dispatcher instance runs per cards_dir was lost. Concurrent dispatcher invocations may cause race conditions.
gotchas_discovered.risk: Multiple dispatchers could claim same card or create duplicate work

gotchas_discovered.description: Using tokio::sync::mpsc requires explicit 'sync' feature in tokio dependency. Missing feature causes compilation failure.
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Added feature during cargo check/test pass

gotchas_discovered.description: adapters/ollama-local.nu (148 lines) was completely deleted with no replacement or migration notes
gotchas_discovered.implication: May break any workflows relying on Ollama provider

approach_details.changes_scope: 10 files modified/deleted, significant refactor of dispatcher event loop and dependency cleanup
breaking_changes: Removed dispatcher_lock - may require external coordination if multiple dispatchers can run
approach_details.code_quality: Improved - extracted functions, added tests, removed unused deps

recommendations.description: Verify that only one dispatcher instance can run per cards_dir. Consider adding a new synchronization mechanism if external coordination is not guaranteed.
recommendations.risk_if_ignored: Race conditions between concurrent dispatcher invocations

recommendations.description: Clarify in commit message or PR description whether deletion is permanent or part of adapter consolidation. Update documentation if Ollama support is being sunset.
Current timeout-based test (500ms) is forgiving. Add integration tests that validate real filesystem events on macOS, Linux, and Windows platforms.
recommendations.benefit: Higher confidence in cross-platform event delivery

recommendations.description: Add comment or docs explaining that newly-pending cards may take up to 500ms to trigger dispatch due to kernel event delivery latency.
recommendations.benefit: Prevents user confusion about startup delays

recommendations.description: Log poll fallback events periodically to detect if watcher is failing frequently and degrading to poll-only mode.
Current _pending_watcher is dropped implicitly. Consider explicit drop with logging when dispatcher exits.
